contract: Every seed template must preserve a distinct domain-native grammar. The test suite reads this file as the canonical machine-readable source for cover classes, cover-scoped objects, full-deck role markers, and forbidden fallback objects. Templates 06-08 (brutalist / memphis / isometric) are implemented seed HTML — three orthogonal styles chosen for maximum differentiation from 01-05. The 10 design-grammar references in design-polish.md (financial-terminal, clinical-lab, civic-infrastructure, legal-casefile, luxury-atelier, cinematic-storyboard, motion-sequence, system-flow, code-walkthrough, data-visual-studio) remain unimplemented; their 06-15 numbering in design-polish.md is a logical chapter index and does NOT correspond to examples/ filenames.

examples/template-01-editorial-serif.htm.designGrammar: archive desk, evidence wall, plate reading, quote judgment

examples/template-02-dark-tech.html.designGrammar: live ops console, radar proof, telemetry signal, incident simulation

examples/template-03-minimal-spatial.htm.designGrammar: architectural plate, title block, dimension chains, measured floor plan, section cut

examples/template-04-vibrant-gradient.ht.designGrammar: live keynote stage, giant screen, countdown ticker, audience floor, camera frame, product drop

examples/template-05-nature-fresh.html.designGrammar: physical field desk, notebook spread, pinned route map, sample tags, specimen envelope

examples/template-06-brutalist.html.designGrammar: bare structure, hard borders, exposed grid, mono coordinates, acid-yellow accent, brutal display weight

examples/template-07-memphis.html.designGrammar: 80s memphis, clashing color blocks, geometric shapes (triangle/circle/wave), bold black outlines, asymmetric scatter

examples/template-08-isometric.html.designGrammar: isometric 3d layers (edge/mesh/data), 30-degree stack, sidecar mesh, growth bars, cross-cut security
